name: Cheesy Chicken Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, bring the chicken broth to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; add potatoes, carrots, celery, onion, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Meanwhile, melt butter in a medium saucepan. Add flour and mix well.
4. Gradually stir in milk; cook over low heat until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in cheese and cook until melted. Add to broth along with chicken.
6. Cook and stir over low heat until heated through.
YIELD: 6-8 servings
